primary_themes: ETF classification and ETF normalized artifacts
Helper CLI ergonomics and machine-readable status

ideas.finding: Generic or unknown asset-type decisions overrode stronger ETF evidence.
ideas.recommendation: Add evidence-ranked asset-type resolution that lets explicit ETF flags and ETF endpoint payloads override generic equity classifications while preserving alternates.

ideas.finding: ETF profile and holdings evidence existed in raw or public issuer sources but was not normalized into ETF-specific deterministic artifacts.
ideas.recommendation: Normalize Alpha Vantage ETF profile fields and available ETF holdings into normalized/etf_profile.json and normalized/etf_holdings.json.

ideas.finding: Final reports repeatedly cited deterministic source IDs that were missing or fragile in final sources.json.
ideas.recommendation: Create a shared source_registry_reconcile.py helper and wire it into validation scaffolds and finalization/remediation workflows.

ideas.finding: Runtime-local source paths leaked into final report packages even when report-local source_bundle copies existed.
ideas.recommendation: Rewrite local_artifact paths to reports/SYMBOL/AS_OF/source_bundle during runtime-to-report sync after verifying copied files.

ideas.finding: Some deterministic usage rationales were repetitive and weak even though verifier guidance says boilerplate is insufficient.
ideas.recommendation: Add deterministic usage rationale-quality checks for repeated boilerplate and missing field/value-specific investor relevance.

ideas.finding: PDF helper can report no generated PDF while returning status 0, making automation infer status from text.
ideas.recommendation: Emit machine-readable PDF generation status while keeping missing optional tooling non-blocking.

ideas.finding: Final-report validation is easy to invoke with a deterministic data path plus explicit report paths, producing a confusing mode error.
ideas.recommendation: Improve error text or accept explicit final report paths while deriving canonical output locations.

ideas.finding: Dependent helper commands can fail when parallelized before init-run creates the dated runtime directory.
ideas.recommendation: Make mutating procedural helper commands auto-create the dated run directory or fail with a dependency-specific message.

implementation_tracks: PDF status and validator CLI ergonomics
